queries.name: universities-offering-credentials
queries.query: (university OR college OR academic) (certificate OR credential OR diploma OR degree) (digital OR online OR blockchain OR verify) lang:en -is:retweet

queries.name: elearning-platforms-certifications
queries.query: from:(coursera OR udemy OR edX OR udacity OR pluralsight OR skillshare OR linkedin_learning) (certificate OR certification OR credential OR completion)
queries.description: Major e-learning platforms posting about certificates

queries.name: bootcamp-providers
queries.query: (bootcamp OR "coding bootcamp" OR "data science bootcamp" OR "cybersecurity bootcamp") (certificate OR completion OR credential) lang:en -is:retweet

queries.name: professional-training-providers
queries.query: (professional training OR corporate training OR skill development) (certificate OR credential OR badge OR certification) lang:en -is:retweet

queries.name: certification-bodies
queries.query: (AWS OR Google OR Microsoft OR Cisco OR CompTIA OR PMI) (certification OR certified OR credential OR exam) lang:en -is:retweet

queries.name: online-universities
queries.query: ("online university" OR "online college" OR "distance learning" OR "remote education") (degree OR diploma OR certificate OR credential) lang:en -is:retweet

queries.name: mooc-providers
queries.query: (MOOC OR "massive open online course" OR "online learning platform") (certificate OR completion OR credential) lang:en -is:retweet

queries.name: tech-bootcamps
queries.query: ("General Assembly" OR "Flatiron School" OR "Le Wagon" OR "Ironhack" OR "BrainStation") (certificate OR completion OR graduate)

queries.name: higher-ed-digital-credentials
queries.query: (higher education OR academia) ("digital credential" OR "digital badge" OR "micro-credential" OR "blockchain credential") lang:en -is:retweet
queries.description: Higher education institutions discussing digital credentials

queries.name: learning-management-systems
queries.query: (LMS OR "learning management system" OR Moodle OR Canvas OR Blackboard) (certificate OR credential OR badge OR completion) lang:en -is:retweet

queries.name: credential-verification-talk
queries.query: ("we verify" OR "we issue" OR "our certificates" OR "our credentials") (diploma OR degree OR certificate OR credential) lang:en -is:retweet

queries.name: accredited-institutions
queries.query: (accredited OR accreditation) (university OR college OR institution OR academy) (certificate OR degree OR diploma OR credential) lang:en -is:retweet

queries.name: vocational-training
queries.query: (vocational OR "trade school" OR "technical college" OR "career center") (certificate OR diploma OR credential OR certification) lang:en -is:retweet

queries.name: continuing-education-providers
queries.query: ("continuing education" OR "professional development" OR CEU OR CPE) (certificate OR credential OR certificate) (university OR college OR provider) lang:en -is:retweet

queries.name: badge-platforms
queries.query: (Credly OR Badgr OR "Open Badges" OR Accredible) (digital badge OR credential OR certificate OR verification)

settings.description: Discovers institutional accounts (universities, e-learning platforms, bootcamps) that are potential customers for BWS products. Uses keyword searches to find organizations discussing credentials, certificates, and educational programs.
